<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <phpunit xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="vendor/phpunit/phpunit/phpunit.xsd" bootstrap="vendor/autoload.php" colors="true" > <testsuites> <testsuite name="Test Suite"> <directory suffix="Test.php">./tests</directory> </testsuite> </testsuites> <source> <include> <directory>app</directory> <directory>src</directory> </include> </source> </phpunit>
